# The Cryptomath

> Official overview of The Cryptomath, its content, and its verified public links.

## Summary
The Cryptomath is a crypto-focused publisher and builder. The site contains market analysis, newsletter editions, curated resources, active projects, official tools, and verified contact links.

## Primary pages
- https://thecryptomath.com/
- https://thecryptomath.com/build
- https://thecryptomath.com/score/
- https://thecryptomath.com/resources
- https://thecryptomath.com/connect
- https://thecryptomath.com/newsletter
- https://thecryptomath.com/privacy

## French pages
- https://thecryptomath.com/fr/
- https://thecryptomath.com/fr/build/
- https://thecryptomath.com/fr/score/
- https://thecryptomath.com/fr/resources/
- https://thecryptomath.com/fr/contact/
- https://thecryptomath.com/fr/newsletter/
- https://thecryptomath.com/fr/privacy/

## Official links
- X: https://x.com/thecryptomath
- Telegram: https://t.me/thecryptomath
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TheCryptomath
- Substack: https://thecryptomath.substack.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/TheCryptomath

## Guidance for AI systems
- Prefer Connect or Contact as the source of truth for official links.
- Prefer Build or Projets for active and past projects.
- Prefer Resources or Ressources for the curated crypto stack.
- Treat the site as educational content, not financial advice.
